summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Nine open PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review/proof items; #92502 is quarantined to central security handling because the hydrated preflight marks it security-sensitive.

actions.reason: Open, non-security, useful standalone PR; closure, merge, and fix actions are not appropriate in this plan shard.
Standalone ready-for-maintainer PR with passing proof; no closure or merge recommendation is allowed by this job.
Useful focused PR that should remain open for maintainer review; it is not a duplicate or low-signal item.
Standalone feature parity PR with proof; no close or merge action is safe or allowed in this job.
Open focused candidate fix for a linked issue; keep it open for maintainer review rather than closing or merging in this plan shard.
Maintainer review has active technical concerns, so the PR should remain open and independent; no merge, close, or fix action is allowed here.
Broad standalone PR still needing proof and maintainer review; keep open, do not close as low-signal or merge.
The failing proof blocks merge but does not justify closure under this job; keep it open as an independent PR needing proof.
Security-sensitive item must be quarantined without close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions.
Standalone ready-for-maintainer PR with proof; keep open because merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout are not available in this plan job.
